form.formComment: Missed the frame latest when sixth over 375m at Manawatu in a Class 1. Starts from box 1 for the first time here. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.3 lengths at Manawatu over 457m (25.89) beating Mailman's Coming in Class 1 on April 14. Makes plenty of appeal. Expected to go well again.

form.formComment: Has finished in the money at his last four runs, the latest when second (30.61) at Addington. Has a low draw. Must be included.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at Manawatu last time when a 1.3 lengths second but did record a solid 25.98 over the 457m trip. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 457m at Manawatu. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (21.91) over 375m at Cambridge Raceway. May find this a bit too tough.

formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (21.91) over 375m at Cambridge Raceway. May find this a bit too tough.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Class 2/3 on April 9 over 525m at Addington behind Devil Delia beaten 8 lengths (30.87). Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 14 over 457m at Manawatu in a Class 1. Not keen this time.
